checks.observed: Schedule page showed 7 .day-btn, #time-input, three duration options, #notify-toggle switch, and #save-schedule-btn with 45min pre-selected.
Tapping days א and ד toggled data-selected and updated #days-label and #summary-text.
Time changed to 19:30 and 45 דק׳ remained the sole active duration in summary.
Save with notify off triggered PUT /api/schedule and redirected to /he.
Reopening /he/schedule showed days א+ד, time 19:30, duration 45, notify false.
With notify toggled on, save stuck on שומרים... awaiting Notification.requestPermission; schedule did not save or redirect.
Zero error-level console entries during schedule flow.
Day/duration buttons expose aria-pressed; notify switch has role and aria-checked; time input labeled; h1 present.
Hebrew Schedule copy rendered RTL without raw keys; time 19:30 displayed correctly.

findings.title: Schedule save hangs when reminders are on and notification permission is pending
repro_steps: Click #save-schedule-btn in an environment where Notification.requestPermission does not resolve promptly.
findings.expected: Saving still succeeds even if push permission cannot be granted.
findings.actual: Save button remained disabled on שומרים... and no redirect or confirmed PUT occurred while awaiting permission.

limitations: Notify-on save tested in automated Chrome DevTools where permission prompt may not resolve.
First save redirect inferred from subsequent GET /he in network log.
